basics.name: Yueqiao Chen
basics.summary: Ph.D. student in Computer Science at UC Davis working on information visualization, visual analytics, context-aware prediction, and AI-assisted analytical workflows.

work.summary: Ph.D. student researcher at the Visualization and Intelligence Augmentation (VIA) Lab.

work.name: Xinzhongguan Intelligence Technology Co., Ltd.
work.summary: Assisted in debugging HTTP request security flaws and used tools including Postman to test vulnerable parameters and settings.

publications.summary: Manager-worker framework for context-aware multivariate time-series forecasting.
